steps.title: Compare the table trends
steps.content: From 1910 to 1925, the number of cars produced rose from 123,990 to 3,185,881. Over the same period, the number of companies producing cars fell from 320 to 80. The completion must capture both movements.

steps.title: Reject wrong trend statements
steps.content: Choice B says both figures remained unchanged, but both changed substantially. Choice C says car production decreased and companies stayed unchanged, contradicting both trends. Choice D says both figures increased, but the number of companies decreased. The answer is A.
